body.purpose: Primary reading text, table cells, form labels

label.purpose: Badge text, table column headers, chip labels

motion.name: theme-transition
motion.value: background-color 0.25s ease, border-color 0.25s ease, color 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease
motion.purpose: Theme switch transition on major surfaces

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Indigo surface, white text, 10px radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #6366f1; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: all 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with border stroke.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: all 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; } .dark .ds-btn-outline { border-color: #1e293b; color: #f8fafc; } .dark .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #1e293b; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form input field. Transparent surface, border stroke, indigo focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; height: 32px; width: 100%; min-width: 0; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; background: rgba(241,245,249,0.5); } .dark .ds-input { border-color: #1e293b; color: #f8fafc; } .dark .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .dark .ds-input:focus { border-color: #818cf8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(129,140,248,0.5); }

components.name: Default Badge
components.description: Status badge. Indigo surface, pill-shaped, compact.
components.css: .ds-badge-default { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 40px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #6366f1; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; transition: all 0.2s ease; }

components.name: Secondary Badge
components.description: Secondary status badge. Muted slate surface.
components.css: .ds-badge-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 40px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .dark .ds-badge-secondary { background: #1e293b; color: #f8fafc; }

components.name: Card
components.description: KPI or section card. 10px or 14px radius, shadow-sm resting, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: all 0.3s ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-card-value { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; color: #0f172a; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-card-label { margin-top: 4px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .dark .ds-card { border-color: #1e293b; background: #0f1524; } .dark .ds-card-value { color: #f8fafc; } .dark .ds-card-label { color: #94a3b8; }

components.name: Table
components.description: Data table with header and bordered rows.
components.html:
ProductSKUQtyPrice
Widget AlphaWGT-00142$12.99
Gadget BetaGDT-0027$24.50
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-th { height: 40px; padding: 0 8px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #64748b; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tr { border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-tr:hover { background: rgba(241,245,249,0.5); } .ds-td { padding: 8px; vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; } .dark .ds-table { color: #f8fafc; } .dark .ds-th { color: #94a3b8; } .dark .ds-tr { border-bottom-color: #1e293b; } .dark .ds-tr:hover { background: rgba(30,41,59,0.5); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Navigation link in the fixed dark sidebar.
components.html: ProductsCategories
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(30,41,59,0.5); color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-active { background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(99,102,241,0.1), rgba(139,92,246,0.1), transparent); color: #ffffff; border-left: 2px solid #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(99,102,241,0.05); }

narrative.overview:
StockWise is a clear, efficient workspace for small business owners who need to understand their inventory health and act on it without friction. The interface is quiet but precise: light slate neutrals carry the structure, while indigo appears sparingly as a functional signal (primary actions, focus indicators, active state). Every surface is theme-aware by default, switching between a bright airy light mode and a deep navy dark mode with the same indigo anchor.

The system explicitly rejects overstyled dashboards, heavy gradients, decorative glassmorphism, and anything that looks like a generic admin template. Data is the hero. Cards rest on subtle shadows with gentle hover lifts. Tables are lean and scrollable. Modals appear only after inline alternatives are exhausted.
keyCharacteristics: Clean, airy slate background with a single indigo accent used sparingly (under 10% of any screen)
Cards on a flat surface with subtle shadows and purposeful hover elevation
Uniform border radius cascade: 10px for inputs, buttons, and KPI cards; 14px for section containers; pill for badges
Indigo focus ring (3px, 50% opacity) as the universal interactive indicator
Fully theme-adaptive: every color token switches between light and dark variants

rules.name: The Indigo Signal Rule
rules.body: The indigo accent (#6366f1) is reserved for interactive signaling. It appears on primary buttons, focus rings, active nav links, and hover glows. It does not appear on static decorative elements. If indigo is on a surface, that surface is actionable or focused.

rules.name: The No-Hierarchy-Via-Font Rule
rules.body: One font family. Every hierarchy step is a combination of size, weight, and (for labels) letter-spacing. No serif, no mono, no decorative typefaces. The typography gets out of the way.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are at rest on the same plane. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, elevated context). No decorative shadows on static elements.

dos: Do use the indigo accent exclusively for interactive signaling (buttons, focus rings, active nav).
Do keep cards visually flat at rest; let their border and background define the surface, not a shadow.
Do apply the radius cascade consistently: 10px for inputs and buttons, 14px for section containers, pill for badges.
Do use muted foreground (#64748b / #94a3b8) for secondary text, metadata, and placeholder content.
Do make every component theme-aware by using CSS variable tokens.
donts: Don't use hardcoded color values (text-slate-900, bg-white) that break in dark mode.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient). Emphasis comes from weight and size.
Don't use side-stripe borders (colored border-left/border-right > 1px) on cards or list items.
Don't add decorative glassmorphism (blurred backgrounds on non-functional elements).
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't default to modals for every interaction. Exhaust inline and progressive patterns first.
Don't wrap everything in a container card. Let some content breathe on the bare background.
